lines.name: 38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16'
lines.note: LP 8" Lap: ceil(sqft ÷ 9.17 × 1.10) — PDF coverage (LPZB0884)

lines.name: 440 Series Trim 4/4" x 4" x 16'
lines.note: C3/C4: 2 ISC locations in 1 feature(s), feature-pooled sticks = 2 (18.2 LF); includes 1 unconfirmed (amber) location(s) — field verify

lines.name: 540 Series Trim 5/4" x 4" x 16'
lines.note: windows 4-side (9×14') + doors 3-SIDE head+legs (ruled): entry 2×18' (21−3 sill), patio 0×19' (25−6 sill) = 162 LF ÷ 16

lines.name: Touch up kits
lines.note: 1 per color — bump if multi-color job

lines.name: OSI Quad Max Caulking
lines.note: Default 2 tubes per job

lines.name: J blocks
lines.note: Min 4 — lights, outlets, hose bibs scaled by openings

lines.name: Mini Splits
lines.note: Min 1 — AC linesets, dryer vents, range hoods

lines.name: 38 Series Soffit 16 x 16 Vented
lines.note: Vented (eaves + porches) — ceil( ((overhang 12" ÷ 12) × eaves_LF + porch_ceiling 0 sqft) ÷ 21.3 × 1.10 ) — PDF 16" Soffit — LP soffit panels eaves only (per-system rule)

lines.name: Gutter 6"
lines.note: Eaves LF (gutters run along eaves, not rakes)

lines.name: Downspout 6"
lines.note: 108 LF eaves ÷ 25 = 4.3 → ceil = 5 downspouts × 13 LF drop = 64 LF coil

lines.name: elbow
lines.note: 108 LF eaves ÷ 25 = 4.3 → 5 downspouts × 2 elbows (top turn + kick-out) = 10 elbows

lines.name: End Cap
lines.note: 2 end caps per gutter run (~1 run per 30 LF eaves, min 2 runs)

lines.name: Hangars with Screws
lines.note: 108 LF ÷ 2 ft spacing = 54 + 4 runs (1 per run) = 58 hangers

lines.name: Mitre
lines.note: Gable roof — gutter doesn't wrap. Outside corners (4) skipped; inside corners 2 → 2 mitres

lines.name: Pipe Clips
lines.note: 5 downspouts × 3 clips (13 LF drop ÷ 6) = 15 clips

lines.name: Gutter Sealant
lines.note: 2 mitres + 8 end caps + 5 outlets = 15 joints ÷ 4 = 4 tubes

lines.name: Cap window
lines.note: 1 per window from HOVER

lines.name: Cap entry door
lines.note: 1 per entry door (D-N prefix, < 72in wide)

lines.name: clean up/ haul away job debris
lines.note: Disposal — one per job when siding work is present

lines.name: 540 Series OSC 5/4" x 6" x 16'
lines.note: C3/C4: 6 OSC locations in 6 feature(s), feature-pooled sticks = 6 (55.5 LF; 16' (192") stick length CONFIRMED)

lines.name: 440 Series Trim 4/4" x 8" x 16'
lines.note: Fascia (eaves 108 LF) + rake slope (70 LF) = 178.0 LF ÷ 16' sticks = 12 — one product both run types; splice-and-round-up total sticks (ruled, C4: whole-stick rounding is the entire allowance on stick-count lines — no % waste); always present on LP-native (ruled)

lines.name: LP Starter — field-ripped from siding stock
lines.note: start-course 168 LF − 6' entry-door width(s) (sliders sit on starter — ruled) = 162 LF — starter stock ripped from 38 Series 8" lap (3 strips per 16' board = 48 LF/board): pieces = ceil(162 ÷ 48) = 4 — THIN WASTE MARGIN on siding (cushion 0.38 pc): starter rips may consume the cushion

osc_detail.note: C3/C4: 6 OSC locations in 6 feature(s), feature-pooled sticks = 6 (55.5 LF; 16' (192") stick length CONFIRMED)

isc_detail.note: C3/C4: 2 ISC locations in 1 feature(s), feature-pooled sticks = 2 (18.2 LF); includes 1 unconfirmed (amber) location(s) — field verify

system_table_enforced: 38 Series Soffit 16 x 16 Closed removed — LP soffit panels eaves only (no rake soffit wrap); rakes carry 440 4/4"×8" rake boards
flags: 1 amber inside-corner location(s) included — field verify
thin siding waste margin — starter rips may consume the cushion
